packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
检测到最新的系统版本。本次重点优化了系统稳定性与流畅性， 修复了特定场景下联系人无法保存等问题，推荐您更新使用。
系统
• 优化系统稳定性与流畅性
• 修复概率性充电异常

应用
• 修复特定场景下联系人无法保存
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
This update improves system stability and performance, and fixes an issue where new contacts cannot be added.
System
• Improves system stability and performance.
• Fixes an issue that might affect charging.

Apps
• Fixes an issue where new contacts cannot be added.
